rationale: Build on the current single-microbatch win by turning unused wallclock slack into more optimizer updates. The last run finished around 579.5s with a 90s reserve, so the script is leaving training time on the table. Dropping the default reserve to 72s should reclaim roughly 15-20s without crowding final serialization/eval, and shrinking `TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS` from 8192 to 6144 should raise update count materially while staying on the fast single-microbatch path. `TRAIN_LOG_EVERY` is relaxed to 50 to avoid spending the extra steps on logging overhead.
title: Smaller Batch And Tighter Reserve
